description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.4-alpine Docker image. Define a netlify-preview job (default stage) that runs the shell commands npm install, npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, and npm run deploy, then in an after_script runs node scripts/slack.js, and configure it to run on all branches except master. Set the CI variable to "true" and NETLIFY_CLAIM_ID to ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined, and the job uses the default test stage.
